description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly red mesh upper with black and white synthetic overlays for structure and durability. The shoe has a black padded collar and tongue, with black laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. A prominent white Asics logo is displayed on the side, contrasting with the red and black color scheme. The midsole is white with black and red accents, and the outsole is made of black rubber with a textured tread for traction. The overall design suggests a focus on comfort, support, and performance, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and streets.
description: A red, black, and white Asics running shoe with a mesh upper, synthetic overlays, and a textured rubber sole for traction.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the black padded tongue, black laces, and the Asics logo on the insole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large white Asics logo, red mesh upper, and the layered construction of the shoe.
description_view_2: Bottom-angled view displaying the black rubber outsole with its detailed tread pattern and the white midsole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded heel collar, heel counter, and the layered materials at the back of the shoe.
attribute_logo: White Asics logo on the side, small orange Asics text logo on the tongue
attribute_sole_pattern: textured with segmented grooves and blocks
